allow: Bash(python -c "import csv; rows=list\(csv.reader\(open\(r'C:/Projects/Breaded man coffee/bearded-man-coffee/demo-products.csv', encoding='utf-8'\)\)\); widths={len\(r\) for r in rows}; print\('row count:', len\(rows\)\); print\('column widths seen:', widths\); print\('header cols:', len\(rows[0]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const parse=\(line\)=>{const out=[];let cur='',q=false;for\(const c of line\){if\(c==='\\"'\){q=!q;continue;}if\(c===','&&!q\){out.push\(cur\);cur='';continue;}cur+=c;}out.push\(cur\);return out;}; const lines=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Projects/Breaded man coffee/bearded-man-coffee/demo-products.csv','utf8'\).split\(/\\r?\\n/\).filter\(Boolean\); const widths=new Set\(lines.map\(l=>parse\(l\).length\)\); console.log\('rows:',lines.length,'widths:',[...widths],'header cols:',parse\(lines[0]\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const parse=\(line\)=>{const out=[];let cur='',q=false;for\(const c of line\){if\(c==='\\"'\){q=!q;continue;}if\(c===','&&!q\){out.push\(cur\);cur='';continue;}cur+=c;}out.push\(cur\);return out;}; const lines=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Projects/Breaded man coffee/bearded-man-coffee/demo-products.csv','utf8'\).split\(/\\r?\\n/\).filter\(Boolean\); lines.forEach\(\(l,i\)=>{const n=parse\(l\).length; if\(n!==36\) console.log\('line',i+1,'cols',n,':',l.slice\(0,120\)\);}\);")
